member.name: T:Valaiorp.Escalation.Contracts.IApprovalProvider
member.summary: Interface for approval providers. Implement this in your host application to integrate with your approval workflows (e.g., web UI, API, or service).

member.name: M:Valaiorp.Escalation.Contracts.IApprovalProvider.RequestApprovalAsync(Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.IExecutionContext,System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Requests approval for an action in the given execution context.
member.param: Optional metadata for the approval request.
member.returns: Approval result with status and details.

member.name: T:Valaiorp.Escalation.Contracts.ApprovalResult
member.summary: Result of an approval request.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Escalation.Contracts.ApprovalResult.IsApproved
member.summary: Whether the action was approved.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Escalation.Contracts.ApprovalResult.ApproverId
member.summary: ID of the approver (e.g., user ID, system ID).

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Escalation.Contracts.ApprovalResult.Reason
member.summary: Reason for approval or rejection.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Escalation.Contracts.ApprovalResult.Timestamp
member.summary: Timestamp of the approval decision.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Escalation.Contracts.ApprovalResult.Metadata
member.summary: Additional metadata (e.g., audit data).

member.name: T:Valaiorp.Escalation.Contracts.IEscalationHandler
member.summary: Interface for escalation handlers. Implement this in your host application to handle escalations (e.g., high-risk actions, policy violations).

member.name: M:Valaiorp.Escalation.Contracts.IEscalationHandler.HandleEscalationAsync(Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.IExecutionContext,Valaiorp.Escalation.Contracts.EscalationReason,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Handles an escalation event.

member.name: T:Valaiorp.Escalation.Contracts.EscalationReason
member.summary: Reason for escalation.

member.name: F:Valaiorp.Escalation.Contracts.EscalationReason.HighRiskAction
member.summary: High-risk action detected.

member.name: F:Valaiorp.Escalation.Contracts.EscalationReason.PolicyViolation
member.summary: Policy violation detected.

member.name: F:Valaiorp.Escalation.Contracts.EscalationReason.UncertainDecision
member.summary: Uncertain decision (e.g., low confidence).

member.name: F:Valaiorp.Escalation.Contracts.EscalationReason.ManualInterventionRequested
member.summary: Manual intervention requested.

member.name: T:Valaiorp.Escalation.Contracts.EscalationResult
member.summary: Result of an escalation handling.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Escalation.Contracts.EscalationResult.IsResolved
member.summary: Whether the escalation was resolved.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Escalation.Contracts.EscalationResult.Resolution
member.summary: Resolution description.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Escalation.Contracts.EscalationResult.HandlerId
member.summary: ID of the handler (e.g., for auditing).

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Escalation.Contracts.EscalationResult.Timestamp
member.summary: Timestamp of the resolution.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Escalation.Contracts.EscalationResult.Metadata
member.summary: Additional metadata (e.g., approval or override details).

member.name: T:Valaiorp.Escalation.Contracts.IEscalationService
member.summary: High-level service for managing escalations, approvals, and overrides. Implement this in your host application to coordinate between providers.

member.name: M:Valaiorp.Escalation.Contracts.IEscalationService.RequestApprovalAsync(Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.IExecutionContext,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Requests approval for an action.

member.name: M:Valaiorp.Escalation.Contracts.IEscalationService.RequestOverrideAsync(Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.IExecutionContext,System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Requests an override for an action.

member.name: M:Valaiorp.Escalation.Contracts.IEscalationService.HandleEscalationAsync(Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.IExecutionContext,Valaiorp.Escalation.Contracts.EscalationReason,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Handles an escalation.

member.name: T:Valaiorp.Escalation.Contracts.IOverrideProvider
member.summary: Interface for override providers. Implement this in your host application to allow manual overrides of actions or parameters.

member.name: M:Valaiorp.Escalation.Contracts.IOverrideProvider.OverrideAsync(Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.IExecutionContext,System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Requests an override for an action in the given execution context.
member.param: Optional new parameters for the action.

member.name: T:Valaiorp.Escalation.Contracts.OverrideResult
member.summary: Result of an override request.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Escalation.Contracts.OverrideResult.IsOverridden
member.summary: Whether the override was successful.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Escalation.Contracts.OverrideResult.OverrideId
member.summary: ID of the override (e.g., for auditing).

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Escalation.Contracts.OverrideResult.OriginalAction
member.summary: The original action before override.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Escalation.Contracts.OverrideResult.NewAction
member.summary: The new action after override.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Escalation.Contracts.OverrideResult.NewParameters
member.summary: New parameters for the action.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Escalation.Contracts.OverrideResult.Timestamp
member.summary: Timestamp of the override.

member.name: T:Valaiorp.Escalation.DependencyInjection.EscalationServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Extensions for registering escalation services in DI.

member.name: M:Valaiorp.Escalation.DependencyInjection.EscalationServiceCollectionExtensions.AddEscalationServices(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Boolean,System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan})
member.summary:
Registers built-in escalation providers so the framework works out of the box.
In production replace with a notification-backed implementation (Slack, Teams, email) by calling services.AddSingleton<IApprovalProvider, MyProvider>() after this call.
member.param: When true, uses (no human gate — suitable for tests/CI). When false (default), uses (blocks for operator input).
Timeout for console approval. Defaults to 5 minutes. Ignored when autoApprove is true.

member.name: M:Valaiorp.Escalation.DependencyInjection.EscalationServiceCollectionExtensions.AddEscalationInterfaces(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Registers the escalation service interfaces with throw-factories so the host application must provide concrete implementations before the service can be resolved. Use instead for built-in implementations.

member.name: T:Valaiorp.Escalation.DependencyInjection.DefaultEscalationService
member.summary: Default implementation of IEscalationService that coordinates between IApprovalProvider, IOverrideProvider, and IEscalationHandler.

member.name: T:Valaiorp.Escalation.Extensions.EscalationExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for escalation in execution contexts.

member.name: M:Valaiorp.Escalation.Extensions.EscalationExtensions.SetEscalationService(Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.IExecutionContext,Valaiorp.Escalation.Contracts.IEscalationService)
member.summary: Sets the escalation service for the context.

member.name: M:Valaiorp.Escalation.Extensions.EscalationExtensions.GetEscalationService(Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.IExecutionContext)
member.summary: Gets the escalation service from the context.

member.name: M:Valaiorp.Escalation.Extensions.EscalationExtensions.RequestApprovalAsync(Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.IExecutionContext,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Requests approval for an action in the context.

member.name: M:Valaiorp.Escalation.Extensions.EscalationExtensions.RequestOverrideAsync(Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.IExecutionContext,System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Requests an override for an action in the context.

member.name: M:Valaiorp.Escalation.Extensions.EscalationExtensions.EscalateAsync(Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.IExecutionContext,Valaiorp.Escalation.Contracts.EscalationReason,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Handles an escalation in the context.

member.name: T:Valaiorp.Escalation.Implementations.AutoApproveProvider
member.summary: Always approves. Use in automated / fully-agentic pipelines where human-in-the-loop is intentionally disabled. Every approval is written to the security audit log so the decision is always traceable. Do NOT use in supervised or production deployments without understanding the implications.

member.name: T:Valaiorp.Escalation.Implementations.ConsoleApprovalProvider
member.summary: Prompts an operator at the console to approve or reject a high-risk action. Suitable for interactive CLI / bot-operator scenarios. Times out and auto-rejects if no response is received within .

member.name: T:Valaiorp.Escalation.Implementations.LoggingEscalationHandler
member.summary: Writes escalation events to a TextWriter (default: Console.Error) and auto-resolves them. Swap for a notification-backed handler (Slack, Teams, PagerDuty) in production.

member.name: T:Valaiorp.Escalation.Implementations.PassthroughOverrideProvider
member.summary: No-op override provider. Returns IsOverridden = false and leaves action and parameters unchanged. Use this as the default when runtime parameter overrides are not needed.
